news.headline: SONIC introduces new Strawberry Mangonada Slush with Tajín seasoning. Available nationwide on March 3. Early access for app users.
news.summary: SONIC® Drive-In is spicing up its Flavorista Favorites premium drink collection with the launch of the new Strawberry Mangonada Slush in celebration of the traditional Mexican mangonada treat. Starting March 3, customers can enjoy this sweet and tangy slush infused with Tajín Clásico Chili Lime seasoning at SONIC locations across the country. A special offer allows SONIC App users to access this limited-time drink before the official release. Get ready for a flavorful experience with the Strawberry Mangonada Slush!

news.headline: Sprout Social customers achieved a 268% ROI, study shows - improving social campaigns profitability by 260%.
news.summary: A recent study on the Total Economic Impact of Sprout Social demonstrates that customers have effectively boosted their profitability by employing data-driven and efficient social campaigns. The analysis highlights the impressive impact made by customers in optimizing their strategies. Through the utilization of Sprout Social, businesses have witnessed significant improvements in their campaigns, resulting in enhanced profitability and streamlined operations. The study provides valuable insights into how customers have harnessed the platform to drive success, showcasing tangible benefits achieved through its utilization.

news.headline: Levi's & Beyoncé launch Chapter 2 with "Pool Hall" in REIIMAGINE campaign, showcasing iconic denim look.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the Levi’s® brand unveiled "Pool Hall," the second chapter of the REIIMAGINE campaign with Beyoncé, showcasing the brand's legacy and Beyoncé's artistic vision. In this collaboration, Beyoncé flaunts a classic denim-on-denim look in the film and imagery. "Pool Hall" follows the success of the first chapter, "Launderette," inspiring audiences. The partnership continues to resonate with consumers, with the campaign garnering substantial attention and positive feedback. Beyoncé's influence has been pivotal in revitalizing the brand's image, with a notable increase in engagement and sales since the launch of the campaign. The Levi’s® brand's collaboration with Beyoncé has proven to be a successful venture, amplifying brand visibility and attracting a wider audience demographic. The partnership has significantly boosted the brand's presence on social media platforms, with a surge in followers and interactions. The REIIMAGINE campaign has solidified Levi’s® brand as a frontrunner in the fashion industry, setting new trends and captivating consumers globally.

news.headline: Global compounding pharmacy market to grow at 6.5% CAGR, reaching US$26,838.8M by 2034 driven by demand for personalized medicine, reveals TMR report.
news.summary: The global compounding pharmacy market was valued at US$13,474.6 million in 2023 and is projected to reach over USD 26,838.8 million by 2034, with a CAGR of 6.5% during this period. This growth is fueled by the increasing demand for hormone replacement therapy (HRT), personalized medicine, and the rising prevalence of chronic diseases. Compounding pharmacies customize medications for individual patient needs, in contrast to traditional pharmacies. Key market players investing in R&D and advanced technologies like automation and robotics are driving market growth. Companies like Walgreen Co., Wedgewood Pharmacy, and Fagron are prominent players. Notable developments include Myonex's acquisition of Saveway Compounding Pharmacy and Precision Compounding Pharmacy's funding for telemedicine-driven services. Key drivers include the growing demand for HRT, adoption of personalized medicine, and advancements in technology enhancing compounding procedures.

news.headline: Atombeam will present in Viasat's ELEVATER Pitch to reduce satellite IoT data volume and costs. Available in Viasat's Marketplace.
news.summary: Atombeam has recently become accessible through Viasat's ELEVATE Solutions Marketplace in MORAGA, California, as of February 24, 2025. Atombeam is known for its groundbreaking technology that transforms data utilization, transfer, storage, and protection methods. The company disclosed its participation in the Viasat ELEVATE Pitch, a novel webinar series.

news.headline: New home market starts 2025 slow, with 649,967 sales in Jan, down 11.3% YOY, marking first decline in a year.
news.summary: In Newport Beach, California, the new home market began 2025 on a subdued note. According to the New Home Market Update on Feb. 24, 2025, new home sales reached 649,967 at a seasonally adjusted annualized rate in January. This figure reflects an 11.3% decline compared to the previous year. The latest data from the Zonda Market indicates a sluggish start to the year for the new home sector.

news.headline: Couchbase Capella partners with NVIDIA to accelerate AI app development. - 125 characters
news.summary: Capella AI Services, in collaboration with NVIDIA NIM, are assisting organizations in creating, launching, and advancing AI-driven applications. On Feb. 24, 2025, in Santa Clara, California, Couchbase, Inc. (NASDAQ: BASE), a leading developer of data platforms for essential applications in the AI realm, revealed the integration of their services.

news.headline: Vistra teams up with Airwallex for global business support. Collaboration to boost efficiency and compliance.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on February 24, 2025, Vistra, a prominent company offering crucial business services facilitating efficient and compliant global investment and growth, announced a collaboration with Airwallex. Airwallex is a worldwide provider of financial infrastructure and applications empowering businesses to streamline their financial operations. This partnership aims to utilize Vistra's expertise in assisting organizations with investments and growth, combined with Airwallex's global financial solutions, to enhance the efficiency and compliance of businesses across the world.

news.headline: Hyundai AutoEver's 'mobilgene® Adaptive' software platform achieves top ASIL-D certification for automotive safety, marking their fifth international standard certification.
news.summary: Hyundai AutoEver has achieved ASIL-D certification for its 'mobilgene® Adaptive' system, the highest safety classification for automotive electrical and electronic systems. This marks the fifth international standard certification earned by Hyundai AutoEver. ASIL-D certification ensures the highest level of safety for automotive systems, underscoring Hyundai AutoEver's commitment to delivering secure and reliable technology to consumers.

news.headline: Matrix Solutions joins Microsoft's ISV Success Program on Feb. 24, 2025, boosting development capabilities.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in Pittsburgh, Matrix Solutions, a top provider of media advertising sales platform solutions, revealed its participation in Microsoft's ISV Success Program. This collaboration aims to boost Matrix's development capabilities, which will benefit the company significantly.

news.headline: Medtronic wins FDA approval for world's 1st Adaptive DBS system for Parkinson's; self-adjusts therapy to brain activity GALWAY, Ireland, Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: In Galway, Ireland, a groundbreaking closed-loop system has been developed to automatically adjust Deep Brain Stimulation (DBS) therapy based on an individual's brain activity in real time. This represents the largest commercial launch of brain-computer interface technology to date. The system is designed to benefit the one million individuals diagnosed with Parkinson's disease in the United States. The innovation aims to revolutionize treatment for these patients by providing personalized and adaptive therapy to optimize effectiveness.

news.headline: BofA and Youth on Course team up to increase youth golf access nationwide, announcing a multi-year partnership.
news.summary: In Monterey, Calif. and Charlotte, N.C., a major collaboration was unveiled on February 24, 2025. Youth on Course, alongside Bank of America, a prominent global financial firm, disclosed a multi-year strategic alliance. This initiative aims to enhance youth participation in golf and provide access to the transformative benefits it offers.

news.headline: Mattress Firm partners with Extend for product protection program across 2,300+ locations. Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: With a wealth of expertise in mattress and furniture protection, Extend assisted Mattress Firm in introducing a product protection initiative in over 2,300 brick-and-mortar stores and online. This exciting development was unveiled in San Francisco on February 24, 2025. Mattress Firm, the leading mattress retailer in the nation, collaborated with Extend to bring this program to a wide network of locations, making it easily accessible to customers both in-store and on the web.

news.headline: Heifer International awarded Cigna's 2024 Silver Healthy Workforce Designation for promoting employee health.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas, on February 24, 2025, Cigna Healthcare announced that Heifer International has been awarded the 2024 silver level Healthy Workforce Designation. This recognition signifies Heifer International's dedication to enhancing the well-being of its employees by promoting a healthy work environment.

news.headline: Waud Capital Partners and George Ahn continue partnership, aiming to acquire and develop top vertical software company.
news.summary: Chicago, on February 24, 2025, Waud Capital Partners and George Ahn have decided to continue their partnership of almost ten years. They have launched a new initiative to acquire and develop a top vertical software company. Waud Capital Partners is a private equity firm that focuses on middle-market businesses looking to expand.

news.headline: Primrose Schools donates $680K and 600K+ items to local communities.
news.summary: In Atlanta on February 24, 2025, Primrose Schools, known for offering top-notch early childhood education, in partnership with its 500+ affiliated schools, gave over $680,000 to charitable causes and provided more than 600,000 items to underprivileged individuals.

news.headline: WesBanco, Inc. (Nasdaq: WSBC) named one of America's Best Regional Banks by Newsweek in 2025 after 155 years of service.
news.summary: In Wheeling, West Virginia on February 24, 2025, WesBanco, Inc. (Nasdaq: WSBC), a diverse, multi-state bank holding company, revealed its inclusion in Newsweek's 2025 America's Best Regional Banks list. This acknowledgment highlights the Bank's impressive 155-year history of providing services.

news.headline: International Fellowship of Christians and Jews supports Ukraine amid war for over 30 years; releases impact numbers.
news.summary: In Jerusalem on February 24, 2025, amidst the ongoing Ukraine conflict now in its third year, The International Fellowship of Christians and Jews (The Fellowship) disclosed its notable contribution figures. With a history of aiding Ukraine and the former Soviet Union region for over three decades, The Fellowship provided key insights into the impact of its support.

news.headline: Chevron (NYSE: CVX) simplifies structure into Upstream and Downstream segments under Mark Nelson.
news.summary: Houston-based Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) has revealed significant senior leadership changes in a move to streamline operations, increase efficiency, and enhance long-term competitiveness. The company will merge its Oil, Products, and Gas organization into two distinct segments: Upstream and Downstream, Midstream, and Chemicals. Mark Nelson will retain his position as vice chairman and executive vic. The restructuring is aimed at driving faster and more effective decision-making within the organization.

news.headline: Greenland Resources signs 10-year off-take agreement with Outokumpu to supply molybdenum; Outokumpu, largest stainless steel producer in Europe, second largest in Americas.
news.summary: In Toronto, Greenland Resources Inc. (Cboe CA: MOLY | FSE: M0LY) has recently disclosed a significant development. The Company has sealed an off-take deal with Finnish Outokumpu, a leading stainless steel producer in Europe and the second largest in the Americas. This agreement secures the long-term provision of molybdenum oxide for Outokumpu. For further details, Outokumpu's official stock exchange release is available on their website at www.outokumpu.com. This promising agreement also includes an agreed-upon price floor.

news.headline: Travelers Institute unveils Spring 2025 Wednesdays with Woodward® webinar schedule featuring thought leaders from public/private sectors.
news.summary: The schedule for the spring webinar series, Wednesdays with Woodward, has been revealed by The Travelers Institute, the public policy arm of The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV), based in Hartford, Connecticut. The virtual series will be hosted by Joan Woodward, who serves as the President of the Travelers Institute and the Executive Vice President of Public Policy at Travelers. Thought leaders from both public and private sectors will participate in discussions on pertinent subjects where insurance, business, and public policy intersect. "Our"

news.headline: EnWave reports Q1 financial results for 2025. Quarter ended December 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on February 24, 2025, EnWave Corporation (TSX-V:ENW | FSE:E4U) announced its first quarter financial results for the period ending December 31, 2024. The Company disclosed consolidated interim financial information for this quarter.

news.headline: Savaria Corp to report Q4 2024 financial results on March 5, 2025, with investor conference call on March 6 at 8:30am EST.
news.summary: In Laval, Quebec, Savaria Corporation ("Savaria") (TSX: SIS), a key player in the accessibility sector, has revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 post market closing on March 5, 2025. The management at Savaria will conduct an investor conference call and webcast at 8:30 a.m. EST on Thursday, March 6, 2025. Interested investors and media personnel can take part on a listen-only basis.

news.headline: Just Salad raises $200M from Wellington Management, valuing the company at $1B, to accelerate growth for health and sustainability.
news.summary: Just Salad has successfully raised capital with Wellington Management leading the effort, resulting in a valuation of $1 billion for the company. The fast-casual restaurant chain, based in New York, disclosed the news on Feb. 24, 2025. Just Salad aims to promote health and sustainability in daily life and is known for its commitment to providing nutritious food options.

news.headline: Visionary Holdings achieves major breakthroughs in targeted therapy, integrating AI into medical field for health advancements.
news.summary: Today in Toronto, on February 24, 2025, the merging of artificial intelligence with the medical sector is presenting promising prospects for human health amidst fast-paced technological progress. A significant development in this area is the utilization of targeted therapy, a crucial aspect of precision medicine. The integration of AI in healthcare brings about innovative solutions that could revolutionize medical treatments and enhance patient outcomes. This synergy between technology and medicine showcases potential for addressing various health challenges efficiently.

news.headline: Neiman Marcus launches Café Society spring campaign celebrating fashion and culinary culture.
news.summary: Introducing its spring campaign, Café Society, luxury retailer Neiman Marcus captivates customers by showcasing the fusion of fashion and culinary culture. The campaign was launched on Feb. 24, 2025 in Dallas and aims to celebrate the intertwining worlds of fashion and food. This campaign is set to inspire customers with a vibrant and unique experience.

news.headline: Feetures, America's top sock brand, introduces new Performance Tees for active lifestyle, starting on Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - On February 24, 2025, Feetures, the leading running sock brand in America, launched its latest product, the Stride Flex Performance Tees. These tees are specially designed for individuals with active lifestyles. The company is leveraging its renowned innovation and commitment to quality from its sock offerings to introduce this new line of Performance Tees. This marks Feetures' expansion into apparel, capitalizing on its decades of expertise in the running gear industry.

news.headline: RTX's Raytheon tests AI/ML-powered Radar Warning Receiver for 4th generation aircraft, to enhance survivability. #RTX #AI #ML
news.summary: Raytheon, a subsidiary of RTX (NYSE: RTX), based in Goleta, California, has recently accomplished flight testing on the initial AI/ML-fueled Radar Warning Receiver (RWR) system. This technological advancement is designed to improve aircrew survivability and expedite the deployment of AI/ML capabilities. The testing took place on February 24, 2025, marking a significant milestone in enhancing the defense sector with cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Online community launched to combat antisemitism on college campuses by 23-year-old Yasmeen Ohebsion and Mandana Dayani.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on February 24, 2025, two advocates are addressing the increasing struggles of Jewish students in college. The founders, 23-year-old Yasmeen Ohebsion and human rights activist Mandana Dayani, have partnered to launch Our CampUs United, a program aimed at promoting unity and support for Jewish students.

news.headline: Enersponse and Molecule Systems partner to enhance virtual power plant capabilities for C&I battery storage, aiding in cost-saving and revenue-generating DR programs. Focused on underserved sector.
news.summary: A collaboration has been established between Enersponse and Molecule Systems in Newport Beach, California. Enersponse, a prominent provider of distributed energy resource management systems (DERMS) and operator of virtual power plants (VPP), has joined forces with Molecule Systems to simplify the process for commercial and industrial (C&I) battery storage developers. This partnership aims to enhance the economic viability of assets by enabling participation in cost-saving and revenue-generating demand response (DR) programs. The C&I battery storage developers, a sector that has historically faced challenges due to technical limitations, will now have improved opportunities for economic benefits through this collaboration.

news.headline: Spirit Airlines receives FAA's Diamond Award of Excellence for aviation maintenance technician safety in February 2025.
news.summary: In February 2025, Spirit Airlines, based in Dania Beach, Florida, received the coveted Diamond Award of Excellence from the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA). This award, the highest honor for Aviation Maintenance Technicians (AMT) bestowed by the FAA, acknowledges the carrier's exceptional performance in maintenance and safety standards.

news.headline: GOL Linhas Aéreas and Sabre strengthen partnership to boost revenue and enhance customer experience, with renewed long-standing agreement.
news.summary: Southlake, Texas and São Paulo, February 24, 2025 - Sabre Corporation, a prominent travel technology company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol SABR, has revealed the continuation of their partnership with GOL Linhas Aéreas, a top airline in Brazil. This renewed agreement solidifies the long-standing collaboration between the two companies.

news.headline: JFrog to present at investor conferences in Q1 2025 - Morgan Stanley on March 6th in SF and Cantor Fitzgerald on March..
news.summary: JFrog Ltd. (Nasdaq: FROG) of Sunnyvale, California, a prominent software company known for the JFrog Software Supply Chain Platform, is scheduled to participate in investor conferences in the first quarter of 2025. They will be presenting at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco, California on March 6th at 9:15 a.m. PST, and also at the Cantor Fitzgerald Global Technology Conference in New York on a date to be announced. These conferences are significant for investors and analysts interested in the company's future direction.

news.headline: Salesforce and Google expand partnership to offer more choices in AI with Gemini on Agentforce.
news.summary: In a recent joint announcement, Salesforce and Google have revealed a significant enhancement to their strategic collaboration, offering businesses a wider array of options regarding the models and features they can utilize to create and implement AI-driven agents. The rapid advancements in the AI sector, particularly the rise of autonomous agents, have made it challenging for businesses to stay current. This extended partnership aims to address this issue by granting customers the essential flexibility needed to design customized AI solutions. This development underscores the companies' commitment to adapting to the dynamic AI landscape to meet the needs of businesses.

news.headline: Simpluris, Inc. announces fair fund distribution plan for Impact Theory founder's keys buyers between Oct 13-Dec 6, 2021.
news.summary: In Costa Mesa, California, on February 24, 2025, Simpluris, Inc., the Fund Administrator for the United States Securities and Exchange Commission, has released a statement regarding the Impact Theory Fair Fund and its Plan of Distribution. A fair fund distribution plan notice has been issued.

news.headline: STACYC introduces 20hDRIVE, their first adult electric balance bike, expanding into new markets.
news.summary: In Milwaukee, LiveWire Group, Inc.'s subsidiary, STACYC, known for its electric balance bikes for kids, has unveiled the 20hDRIVE, the company's initial electric bike specifically for adults. This launch marks a significant shift for STACYC, venturing into new markets and demographics. The 20hDRIVE Class 2 E-Bike offers both pedal assist and twist-throttle functionalities, catering to families wanting to ride together.

news.headline: Patlytics raises $14M in Series A funding from Next47, bringing total funding to $21M in nine months.
news.summary: A San Francisco-based company, Patlytics, has successfully closed a Series A funding round amounting to $14 million. The investment was led by Next47, boosting the company's total funding to $21 million. This significant amount was achieved within a remarkably short span of nine months.

news.headline: FOTILE unveils FreshBake™ Range at KBIS 2025, emphasizing functional and stylish appliances. PARSIPPANY, N.J., Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: FOTILE's recent product launch in Parsippany, N.J on February 24, 2025, showcased their dedication to developing user-friendly and fashionable appliances that elevate cooking experiences across the country. As a leading brand in household goods, FOTILE focuses on creating innovative and family-centric products.

news.headline: Yamaha Motor launches Yamaha Agriculture, Inc. to provide automation and digital crop management solutions for growers.
news.summary: Yamaha Motor Co., Ltd. has introduced Yamaha Agriculture, Inc., a newly established company specializing in autonomous equipment and AI-driven digital solutions for the specialty crop sector. This venture aims to assist growers in improving sustainability, profitability, and resilience amidst challenges like resource scarcity and climate change. Yamaha Agriculture, formed through the acquisitions of Robotics Plus and The Yield, will focus on offering cutting-edge robotics solutions, including spraying and weeding services, to enhance agricultural practices.

news.headline: Pogo Pass and GetOutPass merge to enhance family entertainment with expanded attractions and market growth.
news.summary: In a notable development, Pogo Pass and GetOutPass, prominent family entertainment membership platforms, have consolidated their operations in American Fork and Lehi, Utah. This merger aims to elevate the overall experience for both venues and members. By joining forces, they seek to broaden their scope of attractions, boost visitor numbers at partner locations, venture into fresh markets, and increase the benefits of their passes. This strategic move is set to make family entertainment more convenient and appealing for consumers. The collaborative effort between Pogo Pass and GetOutPass underscores their joint dedication to providing exceptional offerings.

news.headline: Ring Pop introduces chocolate version for first time, featuring milk chocolate with rainbow sprinkles. Limited time only.
news.summary: Indulge in the limited-time offering of Ring Pop-shaped milk chocolate with rainbow sprinkles for a delightful experience this spring. The renowned candy brand Ring Pop, famous for its gem-shaped lollipops, is introducing this exciting product in New York on February 24, 2025. Experience the joy with every bite of this unique treat, which promises to elevate your snacking pleasure.

news.headline: Metro by T-Mobile offers Samsung devices on Us for new customers, with 4 devices and 4 lines for $100/month.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Metro by T-Mobile is offering lucrative deals for new and existing customers. They can save thousands on Samsung devices with the nation's largest 5G network. New customers can avail of an offer that includes four Samsung Galaxy A15 5G devices at no cost and four lines for only $100 per month. The deal also includes free activation without the need for identification or switching from another carrier. This family-friendly offer allows everyone to enjoy the benefits of upgraded devices.

news.headline: Claigan to host webinar on 53-page Canadian Plastics Registry guidance released on Feb. 26. Valuable insights offered.
news.summary: In the upcoming webinar on February 26, Claigan will delve into the details of the concise fifty-three (53) page guidance document released for Phase 1 of the Canada Plastics Registry. This newly issued guidance provides crucial information for stakeholders.

news.headline: Peachtree Group opens dual-branded TownePlace Suites/Fairfield Inn & Suites in Paris, Texas - 51 TownePlace Suites and 62 Fairfield Inn & Suites.
news.summary: Peachtree Group recently unveiled the opening of two new hotels in Paris, Texas, including a TownePlace Suites with 51 suites and a Fairfield Inn & Suites with 62 suites.

news.headline: QGenda helps MyMichigan Health with credentialing, decreasing time and improving efficiency, enhancing provider experience.
news.summary: QGenda, a top healthcare workforce management solutions provider, revealed that MyMichigan Health has adopted QGenda Credentialing to enhance operational efficiency and reduce credentialing time. This move aims to improve the provider experience. QGenda's comprehensive solution streamlines the credentialing process at MyMichigan by incorporating initial application, privileging, payer enrollment, analytics, and more into a unified platform. This change is expected to boost efficiency and enhance overall operations at MyMichigan Health.

news.headline: Spindrift launches new real fruit soda with 5 flavors, less than 8g sugar, no additives, setting new standard.
news.summary: Five fresh flavors created using real hand-squeezed fruit - not from concentrate. These sodas are made the authentic way to offer a healthier option with under 8g of naturally present sugar from fruit and no extra additives. A percentage of sales from Spindrift SODA goes towards regenerative efforts.

news.headline: Fiberon displays top decking, railing, and cladding products at International Builders’ Show, booth #C3830, including Wildwood cladding, CitySide railing, and Concordia PE decking. President David Youn emphasizes innovation and sustainability.
news.summary: Fiberon, a company based in Maumee, Ohio, will showcase its impressive product range at the International Builders’ Show in Booth #C3830. The products to be highlighted include Wildwood composite cladding, CitySide railing system, and Concordia PE composite decking. David Youn, the President of Outdoors at FBIN, expressed that their team of material science experts is committed to creating innovative, sustainable products that cater to the changing demands of modern homeowners and builders. The solutions offered by Fiberon aim to provide increased versatility and style, appealing to a wide audience. Visit Booth #C3830 to learn more about these products.

news.headline: Xima Software reports strong 2024 results, grows market presence and improves contact center solutions.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Denver-based Xima Software revealed its 2024 performance, marking a period of substantial expansion, creativity, and client achievements. The company, renowned for its cloud-based contact center services tailored for small and medium-sized businesses, noted impressive progress over the year. Xima empowers businesses of diverse scales to enhance their operations through innovative solutions, making it a favored choice among organizations seeking to streamline their customer interactions.

news.headline: Janine Williamson, Elder Fraud Prevention Advocate, discloses milestones in advocacy efforts; meets with bankers' group.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Janine Williamson, administrator of the Larry W. Cook Estate, revealed significant progress in her campaign to combat the financial abuse of seniors. Williamson's advocacy includes meetings with high-ranking officials at the American organization.

news.headline: Global study by ServiceNow, Deloitte, and ThoughtLab finds 56% of cities using AI, 83% planning to within 3 years.
news.summary: A recent global study of 250 cities, conducted by ServiceNow and Deloitte in collaboration with ThoughtLab, revealed that cities worldwide are swiftly implementing AI technology to enhance productivity, efficiency, and economic growth. The research indicates that 56% of cities are currently leveraging AI to enhance government operations and services, with an additional 83% planning to integrate AI within the next three years. This highlights the rapid pace at which cities are embracing artificial intelligence to drive innovation and progress.
